title: Welcome!
body: Welcome to the Math and Physics Hallway! This is a sample announcement. Edit slides.json to change content.

title: 🎉 Upcoming Event
body: The Astronomy Public Lecture Series will return on March 28th at 7:30pm with a guest lecture from Cincinnati Observatory Astronomer, Dr. Wes Ryle!

name: Austin Hinkel, Ph.D.
title: Assistant Professor of Physics
bio: Professor Hinkel is currently studying data from the Gaia Space Telescope to explore the structure of the Milky Way Galaxy.  He is also interested in applying data science and mathematical modeling to interdisciplinary topics. Additionally, he is the director of the observatory on campus and the associated astronomy public lecture series where he hopes to make science more accessible to all.  When not teaching or wrangling data, Professor Hinkel enjoys soccer, hiking, spending time with his family, and learning new things. He joined TMU in 2023 after a short stint at Colorado College.

title: 📢 Reminder
body: Theta is the polar angle, not azimuthal!!!
